evals.prompt: Create a login form component with email and password fields using the 2026 design system standards
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a login form component using design tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, border-border), glassmorphism effects on the container, CSS keyframe animations from globals.css (animate-fade-in, animate-scale-in), proper accessibility attributes (aria-labels, focus rings), and responsive design that works on mobile and desktop
assertions: Uses semantic color tokens instead of hardcoded values
Includes glassmorphism effect on the form container
Implements CSS keyframe animations (no JS animation libraries)
Is responsive for mobile and desktop

evals.prompt: Build a card component for displaying books with cover image, title, author, and action buttons
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a card component using the Card primitive from ui/components, glass-card styling, hover animations using CSS transitions and --ease-out-expo, proper image handling with aspect ratio, semantic HTML structure, and responsive grid layout support
assertions: Uses Card primitive or glass-card class
Includes hover animation effects via CSS transitions
Has proper aspect ratio for images

evals.prompt: Create a settings panel with theme selector (light/dark/sepia), font size controls, and line height options
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a settings panel with glass-panel styling, segmented controls using design tokens, smooth transitions between states, keyboard navigation support, and reduced motion support for accessibility
